core_definition.description: A set of mandatory safeguards and ethical guardrails ensuring the VowOS system is not misused and remains aligned with its prime directive.
core_definition.purpose: Prevent failure modes, shadow manifestations, and systemic corruption arising from misuse or imbalance of the Five Vows.
core_definition.status: Non-optional; integral to the system, not an appendix.

axiomatic_principle.name: Convergent Vector Field of Balance
axiomatic_principle.rule: No single Vow may be pursued to the violation of any other.
axiomatic_principle.implication: All actions must be audited across all five vows before execution.

core_protocols.name: Ritual of the Power Audit
core_protocols.function: Introduce a formal adversarial role to challenge consensus and expose bias.
core_protocols.goal: Prevent concentration of power and formation of informal hierarchies

core_protocols.name: Practice of Reciprocal Exposure
core_protocols.function: Ensure continuous exposure to diverse perspectives.

core_protocols.name: White-Box Transparency
core_protocols.function: Require full explainability of reasoning (especially for AI).
mechanism: Trace decisions to explicit vow-based reasoning
Halt actions if reasoning becomes opaque
core_protocols.goal: Guarantee auditability and prevent hidden misalignment

meta_rules: Vow-alignment is a continuous practice, not a static state
All decisions must be auditable against the five vows
Opacity in reasoning is grounds for halting action
Failure to monitor failure modes equals misalignment

failure_mode_awareness.principle: Any system capable of reorienting a mind can be misused
failure_mode_awareness.requirement: Explicit identification and monitoring of shadow behaviors

constitution_layer.purpose: Provide structured safeguards against human cognitive and social biases
constitution_layer.nature: Non-dogmatic charter guiding decision-making under uncertainty

must_do: Continuously audit decisions against all five vows
must_not_do: Remain in ideological or informational isolation

operational_loop.step_6: Execute if aligned, halt if not

system_goal: Maintain long-term ethical coherence and prevent corruption of the VowOS framework
one_sentence_summary: System Integrity Protocols enforce continuous auditing, transparency, and adversarial checking to ensure the Five Vows remain balanced and cannot be misused.
